phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è Via Montenapoleone, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH VEE-ah mon-teh-nah-poh-LEO-neh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Straight ahead, at the second cross street.

responses.english: Straight ahead, at the second cross street.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora aprono i negozi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-rah AH-proh-noh ee neh-GOHT-see, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, posso usare il bagno nel negozio, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, POH-ssoh oo-ZAH-reh eel BAH-nyoh nel neh-GOHT-see-oh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Solo per i clienti, mi dispiace.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOH-loh PEHR EE klee-EHN-tee MEE dee-spee-AH-cheh

responses.phonetic: SOH-loh PEHR EE klee-EHN-tee MEE dee-spee-AH-cheh
responses.local: Solo per i clienti, mi dispiace.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, come si richiede il tax free, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KOH-meh see ree-KYEH-deh eel taks free, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the cash register, with the passport.

responses.english: At the cash register, with the passport.
